text: My pouch of douglas is “obliterated” pictures were taken but nothing in my diaphragm was checked… no excision or removal was done. Left with no guidance on what to do next 🫤

When I had my diagnosis they said they only found one tiny spec of endo on my pouch of Douglas, no pictures, couldn’t answer me when I asked if there was any lesions that weren’t purple. No wonder I didn’t feel much relief after surgery
